hooks.command: bash -c 'for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|*/settings.local.json|pnpm-lock.yaml|*/pnpm-lock.yaml) echo "BLOCK: Cannot modify protected file: $f" >&2; exit 2;; esac; done'

bash -c 'TS_FILES=""; for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.ts|*.mts) TS_FILES="$TS_FILES $f";; esac; done; if [ -n "$TS_FILES" ]; then cd /c/Dev/grooveshop/grooveshop-media-stream && npx eslint --fix $TS_FILES 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'
